question:
It is very important that you never smoke around which hazard classes?
1) All hazard classes
2) It is ok to smoke anywhere.
3) Explosives, Flammable gas, Oxidizers, Flammable solids, Flammable liquids
4) Corrosive, Radioactive, Dangerous, Slippery when wet, Inhalation
canonical_answer: Explosives, Flammable gas, Oxidizers, Flammable solids, Flammable liquids

appears_in.title: Hazmat Endorsement Nj
appears_in.answer: Explosives, Flammable gas, Oxidizers, Flammable solids, Flammable liquids

appears_in.title: Hazmat Practice Test Nj
appears_in.answer: Explosives, Flammable gas, Oxidizers, Flammable solids, Flammable liquids
